assessment_objectives.objective: paper media containing sensitive / regulated data is physically controlled.
digital media containing sensitive / regulated data is physically controlled.
paper media containing sensitive / regulated data is securely stored.
digital media containing sensitive / regulated data is securely stored.
data classification & handling management operations are conducted according to documented policies, standards, procedures and/or other organizational directives.
adequate resources (e.g., people, processes, technologies, data and/or facilities) are provided to support data classification & handling management operations.
responsibility and authority for the performance of data classification & handling management-related activities are assigned to designated personnel.
personnel performing data classification & handling management-related activities have the skills and knowledge needed to perform their assigned duties.
